leadText: Noxious Torque (Japanese: ポイズンアクセル Poison Accel) is a damage-dealing Poison-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of the Navi Starmobile.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Noxious Torque inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of poisoning the target. Encore , Instruct , Mimic , and Sketch fail if the target's last used move was Noxious Torque. Copycat fails if the last used move was Noxious Torque.

sections.title: Description
